title: manulea parviflora var. parviflora
intro: Manulea parviflora var. parviflora, also known as the dwarf manulea, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Manulea parviflora var. parviflora include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
